name: Abdullah Ibrahim
abstract: Abdullah Ibrahim (born Adolph Johannes Brand; 9 October 1934 – 15 June 2026), previously known as Dollar Brand, was a South African pianist and composer. His music reflects many of the musical influences of his childhood in the multicultural port areas of Cape Town, ranging from traditional African songs to the gospel of the AME Church a…

concerts.label: McCoy Tyner Trio with the New Art Ensemble and the Pharoah Sanders Sextet
Concert of Music by Dollar Brand
The Children of Africa, a Benefit for the International Defense and Aid Commitee

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: Abdullah had a – he has a really introspective style... Another great experience. Three or four months, it seems like. We went to Europe, and then we played in New York a number of times.
about_quotes.doc_title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Winard Harper
about_quotes.evidence: in the meantime of working with Betty I also started doing some gigs with Abdullah Ibrahim.

about_quotes.speaker: Buddy Tate
about_quotes.evidence: Dollar Brand had listened to it in South Africa and he said, 'Man, your record selling in South Africa. You got a hit record in South Africa.'
